overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through lush wildflower meadows toward a distant castle during golden hour. The scene features warm sunset lighting, rural countryside architecture, and a large oak tree along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through wildflower meadows with distant castle

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant castle, with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the countryside
large stone castle perched on the hillside against the sunset
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
lush grass with red poppies and white wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open meadows filled with wildflowers during golden hour. A distant castle sits silhouetted against the warm sunset ahead, while mountains rise in the background. A wooden fence lines the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path with large oak tree and village views

events.description: path curves left around the large oak tree, changing the view direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving path as it bends left around the large oak tree, with the castle now visible to the left

entered.detail: massive ancient oak tree with spreading branches beside the path
cluster of rural buildings and rooftops becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The path curves left around a massive oak tree on the right, revealing village buildings ahead. The distant castle shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera turns. The wooden fence and open meadows fall behind as the path enters a more enclosed area near the tree.

events.description: village buildings become more prominent and detailed as the path approaches the settlement

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking toward the village with the castle visible on the left hillside, passing the large tree behind him

entered.detail: stone and timber houses with red roofs in the village ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the village outskirts as the path continues forward. The large oak tree is now behind him to the left, while village buildings with distinct architecture become clearer ahead. The lighting shifts from backlit to more direct as the camera faces away from the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through open wildflower meadows that gradually transitions into the outskirts of a rural village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined by a wooden fence, with a distant castle silhouetted against a warm sunset and mountains in the background. As the path curves left, the camera pivots around a massive oak tree, causing the open meadows to fall behind and shifting the castle toward the edge of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal village buildings ahead, with the lighting shifting from a backlit glow to a more direct illumination as the camera turns away from the setting sun. Finally, the path leads directly toward the distinct architecture of the village outskirts, leaving the large oak tree behind to the left.
